expectation: a socially suppressed event stays retained and appears as ordinary context in the next opportunity's bounded snapshot
previously delivered events persist across a Claude session restart and appear in post-restart snapshots within retention bounds
a pending coalesced anchor from a previous session never becomes a wake after restart; no backlog turn is fabricated
a burst during one active turn yields exactly one successor opportunity anchored at the newest event with a fresh snapshot
events arriving with no live Claude session are not delivered by the transport and are never claimed as heard; recovery is bounded native history, declared as a limitation
